assertions.description: The nep_hackerboard has a multi-device I2C bus (SDA/SCL) connecting U1 through U4. The analyzer correctly identifies both SDA and SCL nets in bus_analysis.i2c, lists all 4 devices per line, and correctly reports has_pull_up=false. The corresponding design_observations also flag the missing pull-up resistors, providing useful actionable feedback for this design.
